name: Ricoh THETA SC2 4K 360 Spherical Camera
description: The THETA SC2 is simple to operate for beginners and everyone else, and it's so compact it can be kept in your pocket at all times and pulled.

features.Key Features:: Easy-to-Use Enthusiast 4K 360 Camera | Internal Stitching, 4K Shake Correction | 360 4K30 Video & 5376 x 2688 360 Photos | Face Correction, Night Mode, 14GB Memory
features.What’s In The Box?: Ricoh THETA SC2 4K 360 Spherical Camera (Blue) | Soft Case | Micro-USB Cable | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
